title: Willie (v4)
description: Full 7:40 restoration of the 1928 Disney short Steamboat Willie — gate-weave stabilization (OpenCV ORB+RANSAC), global + per-pixel bilateral deflicker with a motion-gated temporal kernel that prevents pre- and post-motion ghosts, nlmeans denoise. Ships a before/after scrubber and the complete film.
license_notes: Steamboat Willie (1928, Walt Disney / Ub Iwerks) — public domain in the US since January 1, 2024. OpenCV (Apache-2.0), NumPy/SciPy (BSD), Pillow (HPND), FFmpeg (LGPL/GPL).
